name: Strobe Flash
description: Reproducible twin of create_strobe: a square-wave LFO CHOP gates a Level TOP that flashes a solid Constant TOP on and off at a set rate. The flash is driven by a parameter expression on the Level TOP's brightness1 that reads the LFO channel, so the strobe animates offline off absTime with no callbacks. Rate and duty are exposed as live controls. Offline-validated against RecipeSchema; live-cook-validated on TD 099 build 2025.32820. WARNING: strobing light can trigger photosensitive seizures — keep rate moderate for audiences.

nodes.name: flash
nodes.comment: Solid white flash color — change for colored strobes.

nodes.name: strobe_lfo
nodes.comment: Square wave that gates the flash. frequency = strobe rate in Hz; bias = duty cycle.

nodes.name: blink
nodes.comment: Gated brightness; brightness1 is driven by an expression that reads the LFO channel.

parameters.name: strobe_gate
parameters.description: Full brightness when the LFO is high, black when low — the strobe gate. op('strobe_lfo') resolves to the created node path at build time.

preview_description: A full-frame white flash switching hard on and off eight times a second — a beat-synced strobe with rate and duty on live knobs (use with photosensitivity caution).
